mapper.select: SELECT category_id, category_name AS categoryName, sub_category_name AS subCategoryName, sort_order FROM category WHERE category_name = #{category} ORDER BY sort_order ASC

SELECT c.sort_order, c.category_id, c.category_name AS categoryName, c.sub_category_name AS subCategoryName, f.food_name AS foodName FROM food f JOIN category c ON f.category_id = c.category_id WHERE category_name = #{category} ORDER BY c.sort_order
